description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-pound {season}-season backpacking tent designed for {use_case}. Features a {fly_type} rainfly with {waterproof_rating}mm waterproof coating and {pole_material} poles for a balance of strength and weight. The {floor_area} sq ft floor area comfortably fits {capacity} sleeper(s) with {vestibule_count} vestibule(s) providing sheltered gear storage. Packed size of {packed_size} fits easily in or on a pack. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Interior mesh pockets and a gear loft keep essentials organized.
Color-coded pole sleeves allow for quick pitching even in fading light.
DAC stakes and guylines are included for high-wind stability.
Two doors provide easy entry and exit without climbing over your tent mate.
Reflective guylines improve nighttime visibility at camp.
Bathtub-style floor construction prevents water seepage in wet conditions.
use_case_pool: thru-hiking on the AT or PCT

description_template: The {name} is a spacious {capacity}-person car camping tent with {peak_height} inches of peak height for easy movement inside. Built with {pole_material} poles and a {waterproof_rating}mm waterproof rated fly for reliable weather protection. The {floor_area} sq ft floor area offers room for the whole group with a {door_count}-door design for convenient access. Setup takes approximately {setup_time} minutes. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Large mesh windows provide excellent cross-ventilation on warm nights.
Includes a removable room divider for privacy in family camping setups.
Electrical cord port allows you to run a power strip from a campsite outlet.
Front vestibule area is perfect for storing muddy boots and camp chairs.
Gear loft and wall pockets keep phones, flashlights, and books off the floor.
Welded floor seams eliminate the need for seam sealing and improve waterproofing.

description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-pound hammock shelter system rated to hold up to {weight_capacity} lbs. Made from {material} with a {suspension_type} suspension system for easy setup between trees. {rainfly_detail} The packed size of {packed_size} makes it an ultralight alternative to traditional tent camping. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Integrated bug net keeps mosquitoes and no-see-ums out while you sleep.
Asymmetric design allows for a flatter lay and more comfortable side sleeping.
Includes whoopie sling suspension for tool-free length adjustment.
Compatible with most aftermarket underquilts for cold-weather hammocking.
Structural ridgeline maintains consistent sag for ergonomic comfort.
Stuff sack doubles as an internal gear pocket when the hammock is hung.
rainfly_details: Includes a diamond-shaped silnylon tarp with 95% coverage against rain.
Sold with a hex-shaped rainfly offering full coverage in driving rain.
Comes with a lightweight tarp that packs down to the size of a water bottle.

description_template: The {name} is a premium down sleeping bag filled with {fill_power}-fill-power {down_type} down, offering exceptional warmth-to-weight ratio at just {weight} lbs. Comfort-rated to {temp_rating}°F with a {baffle_type} baffle construction that prevents cold spots. The {shell_material} shell resists moisture, and the {shape} shape balances thermal efficiency with room to move. Fits users up to {fits_to} inches tall. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Draft collar and draft tube along the zipper seal out cold air infiltration.
Includes a compression stuff sack and a cotton storage sack for loft preservation.
DWR-treated down maintains loft even in damp conditions.
Trapezoidal foot box gives your feet room to rest naturally without compression.
Half-length zipper saves weight while still allowing temperature regulation.
Zipper guard prevents snags for smooth operation in the dark.

description_template: The {name} is a synthetic-insulated sleeping bag rated to {temp_rating}°F, using {insulation_type} insulation that retains warmth even when wet. Weighing {weight} lbs with a {shape} shape and {shell_material} shell. Features a {zipper_type} zipper and fits users up to {fits_to} inches. A reliable choice for {use_case} where moisture resistance matters more than minimal pack weight. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Synthetic fill dries 3x faster than down, making it ideal for humid climates.
Pillow pocket at the hood lets you stuff a jacket for head support.
Two bags can zip together for a double-wide configuration.
Anti-snag zipper design for frustration-free operation in the tent.
Includes both a stuff sack and a mesh storage bag for home storage.
EN/ISO tested temperature rating gives you confidence in the bag's performance.
use_case_pool: kayak camping where gear gets damp

description_template: The {name} is a {pad_type} sleeping pad with an R-value of {r_value}, providing {insulation_level} insulation for {use_case}. At {weight} lbs and {thickness} inches thick, it balances comfort and packability. Dimensions of {length}x{width} inches fit {size_fit}. {inflation_detail} {extra_detail}
extra_details: Textured surface prevents your sleeping bag from sliding off during the night.
Tapered shape shaves ounces for weight-conscious backpackers.
Includes a repair kit with adhesive patches for field fixes.
Horizontal baffles cradle your body and reduce pressure points.
Compatible with the brand's pump sack for quick, breath-free inflation.
Packs down to the size of a 1-liter water bottle.
inflation_details: Self-inflating foam core requires just a few breaths to top off.
Hand pump integrated into the stuff sack inflates the pad in under a minute.
Manual inflation via the twist valve takes approximately 10-15 breaths.

description_template: The {name} is a {boot_height} hiking boot built on a {upper_material} upper with {waterproof_type} waterproof protection. The {outsole_type} outsole provides {lug_depth}mm lug depth for reliable traction on {terrain_type} terrain. A {midsole_type} midsole delivers {cushion_level} cushioning with {weight} oz total weight per pair. {width_detail} {extra_detail}
extra_details: Padded collar and tongue reduce pressure points during long descents.
Heel brake geometry improves control on steep downhill sections.
Gusseted tongue keeps trail debris out of the boot interior.
TPU heel counter provides stability on uneven surfaces without adding bulk.
Nylon shank bridges the arch for support on rocky terrain without being overly stiff.
OrthoLite footbed provides long-lasting antimicrobial cushioning.
width_details: Available in standard and wide widths.
Roomy toe box accommodates foot swelling on long hiking days.
Standard D-width fit with a secure heel cup.
use_case_pool: multi-day backpacking with a heavy pack

description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-ounce trail running shoe with a {drop}mm heel-to-toe drop and {stack_height}mm stack height. Features a {upper_type} upper for {breathability_level} breathability and a {outsole_type} outsole with {lug_depth}mm lugs for grip on {terrain_type} surfaces. The {cushion_type} midsole provides {cushion_feel}. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Rock plate in the forefoot protects against sharp stones and roots.
Quicklace system allows one-pull tightening with no knots to come undone.
Gaiter attachment points compatible with trail running gaiters for debris protection.
Drainage ports in the midsole shed water after creek crossings.
Reinforced toe cap guards against rock and root strikes.
Ortholite insole provides long-run cushioning and moisture wicking.

cushion_feel: balanced cushion with good ground feedback

description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-ounce {shoe_type} designed for wearing around camp after a long day on the trail. Features a {sole_type} sole with {footbed_type} footbed for {comfort_level} comfort. {closure_type} closure. Made from {material} for easy cleaning and quick drying. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Antimicrobial treatment keeps odors in check after sweaty hiking days.
Packable design compresses flat and clips to the outside of your backpack.
Toe protection prevents stubbing on rocks and roots around camp.
Adjustable straps accommodate swollen feet after a long hike.
Water-friendly construction makes them perfect for river crossings and camp showers.
Lightweight enough to justify carrying as a second pair on multi-day trips.

description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-ounce {layer_count}-layer waterproof rain jacket made with {membrane_type} membrane technology. Rated at {waterproof_rating}mm waterproofing and {breathability}g/m²/24hr breathability. Features {hood_type} hood, {pocket_count} zippered pockets, and {hem_type} hem adjustment. Packs into its own pocket for {packed_size} packed size. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Fully taped seams prevent water intrusion at every stitch point.
Pit zips provide dump ventilation during high-output activities.
Helmet-compatible hood adjusts in three dimensions for a custom fit.
DWR finish causes rain to bead and roll off the face fabric.
Laminated visor on the hood channels water away from your face.
Articulated sleeves allow full range of motion for climbing and scrambling.
use_case_pool: travel and commuting in wet climates

description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-ounce insulated jacket filled with {insulation_type} providing warmth in temperatures down to {comfort_temp}°F. Features a {shell_material} shell with {baffle_style} baffles, {collar_type} collar, and {pocket_count} hand pockets. Packs into its own pocket to roughly {packed_size}. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Elastic cuffs and hem seal in warmth without the bulk of drawcords.
Interior dump pocket doubles as a stuff sack for packability.
DWR-treated shell sheds light moisture and snow.
Chin guard behind the zipper prevents cold zipper contact on skin.
Two-way zipper for venting while seated or wearing a harness.
Works as a standalone layer or as a midlayer under a shell in extreme cold.
use_case_pool: belaying and rest stops in cold temps

description_template: The {name} is a {weight_class}-weight base layer made from {fabric_type} for {primary_benefit}. Weighing {weight} oz with a {fit_type} fit and {seam_type} seams for comfort under a pack or harness. {fabric_weight}gsm fabric provides {warmth_level} warmth. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Merino wool naturally resists odor, so you can wear it multiple days on a backpacking trip.
Flatlock seams prevent chafing during high-output activities.
Thumbhole cuffs keep sleeves in place when layering.
Raglan sleeve construction improves mobility for climbing and skiing.
Drop-tail hem stays tucked in during active movement.
UPF 30+ sun protection for exposed alpine environments.

description_template: The {name} is a {weight}-ounce pair of hiking pants made from {fabric_type} with {stretch_type} stretch for unrestricted movement on the trail. Features {pocket_count} pockets including {pocket_detail}, {waist_type} waistband, and {sun_protection} sun protection. {inseam} inseam. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Articulated knees allow full range of motion for scrambling and high-stepping.
DWR finish repels light rain and resists trail grime.
Convertible zip-off legs convert pants to shorts in seconds.
Gusseted crotch eliminates binding during high-step moves.
Roll-up leg snaps let you convert to a capri length for water crossings.
Built-in belt eliminates the need for a separate belt and reduces pack weight.
use_case_pool: travel pants that transition from trail to town

description_template: The {name} is a {volume}-liter backpacking pack weighing {weight} lbs, designed for {load_range}-pound loads. Built with a {frame_type} frame and {hipbelt_type} hipbelt that transfers {load_transfer}% of the load to your hips. Features a {access_type} main compartment access, {pocket_count} external pockets, and {hydration_detail}. Torso adjustable from {torso_range}. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Floating top lid converts into a summit daypack for peak-bagging side trips.
Sleeping bag compartment with a zippered divider keeps your bag accessible from the bottom.
Trekking pole and ice axe attachment loops keep tools secure and accessible.
Side compression straps stabilize partial loads and lash down extra gear.
Stretch mesh front panel stashes wet layers or a tent footprint for quick access.
Load lifter straps fine-tune the carry for uphill and downhill sections.

hydration_detail: hydration sleeve fits up to 3L reservoir
internal hydration sleeve with hose port
compatible with hydration bladders up to 3 liters

use_case_pool: thru-hiking the AT, PCT, or CDT

description_template: The {name} is a {volume}-liter daypack weighing just {weight} oz, built for {use_case}. Features {suspension_type} suspension with {back_panel_type} back panel for ventilation. Includes {pocket_count} pockets, {hydration_detail}, and {attachment_points} external attachment points. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Stretch side pockets fit most water bottles for on-the-go hydration.
Breathable mesh back panel creates airspace between your back and the pack.
Integrated rain cover stows in a bottom pocket and deploys in seconds.
Trekking pole carry system attaches poles for hands-free scrambling.
Internal key clip and organizer pocket keep small items from getting lost.
Reflective accents improve visibility on early morning or late evening hikes.
use_case_pool: fast and light trail running approaches
short overnight trips with minimal gear

description_template: The {name} is a {stove_type} camp stove weighing {weight} oz with a {boil_time}-minute boil time for 1 liter of water. Fuel type: {fuel_type}. Features {ignition_type} ignition, {flame_control} flame control, and {pot_support_type} pot supports. {wind_detail} {extra_detail}
extra_details: Integrated pot system nests together for a compact, all-in-one carry.
Piezo ignition eliminates the need for matches or a lighter.
Simmer control allows precise heat adjustment for cooking real meals, not just boiling water.
Folding legs and pot supports stow inside the stove body for minimal packed size.
Compatible with standard 8-oz isobutane-propane canister (sold separately).
Includes a windscreen that clips around the burner for improved performance in breezy conditions.
wind_details: Built-in wind guard surrounds the burner for reliable performance in exposed conditions.
Recessed burner design provides natural wind protection without a separate screen.
Includes a detachable windscreen for use above treeline and on ridgelines.
use_case_pool: winter mountaineering where reliable fuel matters

description_template: The {name} is a {person_count}-person cookset made from {material} weighing {weight} oz total. Includes {piece_count} pieces: {pieces_detail}. {coating_detail} All pieces nest together for a packed size of {packed_size}. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Folding handles lock in place for cooking and fold flat for nesting.
Mesh stuff sack included for organized storage and drying.
Measurement markings molded into pot interior for trailside recipe accuracy.
Lid doubles as a strainer with built-in drain holes.
Compatible with most canister stove pot support diameters.
BPA-free plates and bowls are dishwasher safe for easy cleaning at home.

pieces_detail: 1.5L pot, 750mL pot, frypan, 2 plates, and 2 mugs
coating_detail: Non-stick coating for easy cleanup and low-oil cooking.
Uncoated surface is more durable and better for campfire use.
Ceramic non-stick coating is PFOA-free and easy to clean.

description_template: The {name} is a {filter_type} water treatment system weighing {weight} oz with a {flow_rate} liter-per-minute flow rate. Removes {removes} using a {pore_size}-micron filter element. Filter lifespan of {lifespan}. {method_detail} {extra_detail}
extra_details: Backflush syringe included for field cleaning and maintaining flow rate.
Threaded connection fits standard water bottle mouths for inline use.
Activated carbon element improves taste by reducing chemical contaminants.
Press-and-drink design filters water in under 15 seconds — no waiting, no squeezing.
Gravity-fed operation is ideal for filtering water for a group at camp.
Fits in a pants pocket for quick access at stream crossings.
method_details: Squeeze-style operation: fill the pouch, screw on the filter, and squeeze clean water into your bottle.
Gravity-fed system hangs from a tree and filters water hands-free while you set up camp.
Pump-style operation draws water from the source through a hose and filters into your container.
Press-style: fill the bottle, press the filter down, and drink directly.

removes: bacteria and protozoa with activated carbon for taste

use_case_pool: group camping water for the whole camp
international travel to areas with questionable water
day hiking without carrying all your water

description_template: The {name} is a {max_lumens}-lumen headlamp weighing {weight} oz with {mode_count} lighting modes including {modes}. {power_type} with a {max_runtime}-hour max runtime on low. {beam_type} beam throws light up to {beam_distance} meters. IPX{waterproof_rating} water resistance. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Red night-vision mode preserves dark adaptation for stargazing and nighttime navigation.
USB-C rechargeable battery eliminates the need to carry spare batteries on multi-day trips.
Lock mode prevents accidental activation in your pack and saves battery life.
Tilt adjustment lets you angle the beam for close-up tasks or long-range trail viewing.
Memory function returns to your last-used brightness level when powered on.
Low-battery indicator gives you advance warning before the light dies.
use_case_pool: camp cooking and reading after dark
night hiking and predawn summit pushes

description_template: The {name} are {material} trekking poles weighing {weight} oz per pair. {adjustment_type} adjustment from {min_length} to {max_length} cm. Features {grip_material} grips with {strap_type} wrist straps and {basket_type} baskets. {tip_type} tips provide traction on {terrain_type}. {extra_detail}
extra_details: Three-section collapsible design packs down small enough to strap to the side of a daypack.
Z-fold design deploys in seconds and packs to just 15 inches collapsed.
Interchangeable baskets let you swap between small summer tips and large snow baskets.
Extended foam grip below the handle allows for quick choke-up on traverse sections.
Ergonomic 15° angled grip reduces wrist fatigue on long approaches.
Flick-lock adjustment mechanism is easy to operate with gloves on.
use_case_pool: long day hikes with elevation gain
ultralight thru-hiking where every ounce counts
stream crossings and stability on rough terrain
